title: Savory Crunchy Australian Pomegranate Stir-fry
description: A savory and dense dish featuring pomegranate in a low-fat-friendly version with a tadka to energize your meal.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add minced ginger and garlic to the hot oil and stir-fry for about 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Throw in chopped green bell peppers and red onion, toss them with the oil mixture for 5-7 minutes or until they start to soften.
Stir in pomegranate seeds and lemon juice, mix well. Cook for an additional minute to let flavors meld together.
Add soy sauce, stir gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
Heat a tadka (cumin and mustard seeds) in another pan over medium heat until the seeds start smoking lightly.
Drizzle tadka onto the pomegranate stir-fry, incorporating it into the dish with gentle stirring.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves before serving.
